data.title: Armis delivers 351% ROI and blocks 99% of cyber attacks, as per Omdia report, benefiting global organizations.
data.description: In San Francisco, Armis, a cybersecurity company, revealed data from a recent report by Omdia, a technology research firm, on the economic advantages of their Armis Centrix™ platform. The analysis concluded that utilizing Armis can lead to an impressive 351% annual return on investment for businesses worldwide. This is achieved through the integration of thorough cyber risk management, efficient operational processes, and substantial cost reductions. The study serves as confirmation of the significant financial benefits that Armis provides.

data.title: Nearmap and Ecopia AI collaborate to provide off-the-shelf transportation data across North America using high-recency aerial imagery and AI feature extraction.
data.description: Nearmap and Ecopia AI have joined forces to provide advanced transportation intelligence using high-recency aerial imagery. This collaboration, established on January 20, 2026, in Salt Lake City, offers decision-makers a comprehensive geospatial context on a large scale. Nearmap, known for its expertise in property intelligence, brings their high-precision data to the partnership, while Ecopia AI contributes their advanced feature extraction powered by AI. This innovative approach combines cutting-edge technology to deliver accurate insights for transportation at an unprecedented level. It signifies a significant advancement in leveraging aerial imagery and artificial intelligence for informed decision-making in the transportation sector.

data.title: HHS awards $38.9M to Electrosoft for cyber defense. Contracts advance protection of critical health systems.
data.description: On January 20th, 2026, Electrosoft Services, Inc., a reputable cybersecurity and digital transformation company based in Reston, Va., revealed the acquisition of two significant contracts. These contracts, known as CORA and STIM, mark a substantial step forward in enhancing intelligence-based security for crucial health systems. This development highlights the company's commitment to safeguarding critical infrastructure.

data.title: Nature's Path launches gluten-free Love Crunch Granola with Strawberry Cheesecake flavor, targeting wider audience.
data.description: Premium organic Love Crunch Granola line from Nature's Path, the largest independent organic breakfast and snack food brand in North America, is now available for all to enjoy. The expansion of this dessert-inspired crunch was announced on January 20, 2026, in Richmond, BC. Nature's Path is known for its commitment to organic products, and their Love Crunch Granola line is a popular choice among consumers. The line has been extended to provide more options for customers, maintaining the same high-quality and organic ingredients it's known for.

data.title: Innoviz reports positive growth projections and CES success in letter to shareholders. (Character count: 84)
data.description: An open letter was released today by Innoviz Technologies Ltd., a prominent Tier-1 supplier of advanced automotive LiDAR sensor platforms and software. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol INVZ. The letter was published on January 20, 2026 in Tel Aviv, Israel. Innoviz Technologies specializes in providing high-performance LiDAR technology for vehicles and related software solutions.

data.title: Genezen and Atsena form strategic manufacturing partnership in Jan 2026. Genezen is a gene therapy CDMO, Atsena is a clinical gene therapy company.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Genezen, a top gene therapy Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) based in Lexington, Massachusetts, and Atsena Therapeutics, a clinical-stage gene therapy company from Durham, North Carolina, announced a collaboration. Atsena Therapeutics aims to harness the transformative potential of genetic treatments. The partnership allows Genezen to provide its expertise in gene therapy manufacturing to support Atsena Therapeutics. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward in advancing gene therapy research and development efforts.

data.title: Wingman Growth Partners names Cheri Reeve as CFO; specializes in enterprise software, data, fintech.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Greenwich, Connecticut, Wingman Growth Partners, an investment firm specializing in enterprise software, data, and financial technology companies, has appointed Cheri Reeve as the Chief Financial Officer. Cheri will be responsible for overseeing the financial activities of the company.

data.title: Permian Basin Royalty Trust to pay $0.040056 per unit cash distribution on Feb 13, 2026, announced in Dallas.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Dallas, Argent Trust Company, acting as Trustee of the Permian Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: PBT), announced a cash distribution of $0.040056 per unit to holders of its beneficial interest units. This distribution is scheduled to be paid out on February 13, 2026.

data.title: Atmosphera names Mia Davis Chief Impact Officer, bringing her expertise from Credo Beauty and Beautycounter.
data.description: Atmosphera, a renowned company, has appointed Mia Davis as its new Chief Impact Officer. Mia, a former executive at Credo Beauty and Beautycounter, as well as a co-founder of Pact Collective, has a long-standing reputation as a passionate advocate for safer beauty practices. The decision, made public on Jan. 20, 2026, highlights Atmosphera's commitment to sustainability and social impact. This marks a crucial step for the company as it focuses on enhancing its environmental and social initiatives under Mia's leadership.

data.title: Pakked introduces Maverick Ai, first AI estimating chatbot for corrugated industry, improving speed and efficiency.
data.description: Pakked unveiled Maverick Ai on January 20, 2026, marking the debut of the corrugated and folding carton sector's pioneering AI-powered estimating chatbot. Maverick Ai is aimed at revolutionizing the initial sales process for manufacturers by boosting efficiency. This innovative technology promises to enhance speed and accuracy, transforming industry standards.

data.title: Hyundai deepens partnership with Palantir, expanding AI platform to more affiliates for tighter data integration and operational gains.
data.description: Hyundai is expanding its technology collaboration with Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) in a multi-year rollout. This partnership involves leveraging Palantir's Foundry and Artificial Intelligence Platform within the industrial group, moving beyond initial deployments in refining, shipbuilding, and construction equipment. The new agreement, announced recently, broadens access to additional affiliates, including new users. Hyundai aims to integrate data and processes across various sectors, such as electric systems, robotics, and marine services. The collaboration is viewed as crucial for driving digital transformation, facilitating closer collaboration between subsidiaries, enhancing decision-making through automation, and realizing operational improvements in maintenance planning and supply chain management. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI-powered Vendor Statement Reconciliation by Oversight reduces payment errors, boosts AP controls. Leader in spend monitoring tech.
data.description: A recent announcement revealed that Oversight, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven spend monitoring and financial audit solutions, has introduced an innovative Vendor Statement Reconciliation tool. This cutting-edge technology, launched on January 20, 2026, aims to enhance accounts payable controls by eliminating payment errors. By leveraging advanced AI capabilities, this groundbreaking tool is designed to significantly reduce discrepancies in vendor statements, consequently optimizing financial processes. This development marks a significant step towards improving accuracy and efficiency in payment procedures.

data.title: PuroClean named in top 100 franchises by Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500® for 10th consecutive year. TAMARAC, Fla., Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: For the tenth year in a row, PuroClean, a prominent franchise brand specializing in property restoration and remediation, based in TAMARAC, Fla., received esteemed recognition. The company was acknowledged as one of the Top 500 franchises in the nation. This recognition marks a significant achievement for PuroClean, highlighting its continued success and leadership in the industry.

data.title: Tanasi™ introduces patented 1:1 CBD+CBDA formula in wellness products for consumer wellness, trademarked by GreenWay Tanasi, LLC.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on January 20, 2026, GreenWay Tanasi, LLC, a consumer wellness company known for the Tanasi™ brand, revealed that their exclusive 1:1 blend of cannabidiol (CBD) and cannabidiolic acid (CBDA) found in their various products is now safeguarded by a new patent.

data.title: FDA designates Lilly's drug, sofetabart mipitecan, as breakthrough therapy for platinum-resistant ovarian cancer.
data.description: Indianapolis-based pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) revealed on January 20, 2026, that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has awarded Breakthrough Therapy status to sofetabart mipitecan (LY4170156). This designation is for its use in treating adult individuals diagnosed with platinum-resistant...
